item.title: Snk Neo Geo AES
item.description: The Neo Geo AES, also known as the Advanced Entertainment System, was released in 1990 by SNK Corporation. It is a retro gaming console that aimed to provide high-quality graphics and gameplay for avid gamers of its time.
